name: agamaku
description: **AgamaKu** is a premium, mobile-first, and desktop-responsive web application simulating an **"Islamic Grab-style" booking platform**. It connects students looking for specialized religious services—such as Mengaji (Quran Recitation), Tadabbur (Quran Tafsir), Ceramah (Lectures), Tahlil, and Ruqyah—with highly qualified, verified Ustaz & Ustazah partners.
